assertions.description: Output includes a single specific headline message sentence, not a topic description
Visual type recommendation includes a clear rationale explaining why this chart type over alternatives
Format requirements specify exact dimensions, file format, and colour mode

assertion_results.note: Headline: single sentence about 40% salary gap and 18% turnover rate
Recommends scatter plot or bar chart with rationale against pie chart
Single sentence headline about wait time doubling
Visual type with rationale (line chart for time trend)
Headline sentence about Denmark 84% vs Poland 23% renewable gap
Bar chart or small multiples with rationale
Specifies both full-width and 1:1 social card dimensions, dark background specs

methodology: Binary assertion testing: 3 inputs (standard, minimal, European context) x 3 assertions per skill. Each assertion graded pass/fail based on whether generated output satisfies the requirement.
